message:
feat: Add chunked vector search and sort for large datasets

ChunkedGPUVectorSearch:
- Processes vectors in chunks that fit in GPU memory
- 1M vectors × 384 dims = 1.5GB → chunks of 100K = 150MB each
- Maintains running top-K across all chunks
- Automatic chunk size calculation based on memory budget

ChunkedGPUSorter:
- ORDER BY ... LIMIT K optimization: only track top-K, not full sort
- For full sort: external merge sort via OPFS
- GPU bitonic sort for individual chunks

Memory-safe vector search prevents OOM when searching
millions of high-dimensional vectors.
